arts.ttl: Preview: Lyon vs. Nice - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Ligue 1 clash between Lyon and Nice, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Barry Ferguson details 'huge' Rangers problem that still exists despite Nice annihilation
arts.sum: And that has seen Ferguson remind players and fans not to get too carried away with their win on the Cote d'Azur - stating that Philippe Clement will have to come up with solutions to break down teams who sit behind the ball, as opposed to Nice who came and had a go at Rangers . Join Football Scotland's Rangers WhatsApp community!

arts.ttl: Rangers hit out at 'draconian' Nice security measures as furious statement damns treatment of travelling fans
arts.sum: With a security operation labelled as 'draconian', Rangers fans had power banks taken off them by 'heavy-handed' officers - and now Rangers have stated that they will remain in dialogue with UEFA over their next steps despite their strong win. A club statement read on Friday evening: "Rangers FC is deeply concerned over several unacceptable incidents in Nice last night where our supporters’ safety was jeopardised.
